mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, phone, role_id, name, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, phone, role_id, name, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.phone, u.role_id, CASE u.role_id WHEN 0 THEN '园长' WHEN 1 THEN '家长' WHEN 2 THEN '教师' WHEN 3 THEN '保育员' ELSE '教师' END AS role_name, u.status, u.created_at FROM users u
(u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, password, phone, role_id, name, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{roleId}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
